---
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    container-fluid: true
---
```{=html}
<div class="contact-forms-container">
  <div class="forms-intro">
    <h2>Contact AMORE</h2>
  </div>

  <!-- Tab Navigation -->
  <div class="form-tabs">
    <button class="form-tab-btn active" data-form="propose">
      Propose Project
    </button>
    <button class="form-tab-btn" data-form="update">
      Update Existing Project
    </button>
    <button class="form-tab-btn" data-form="feedback">
      Get Help or Share Feedback
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Form Panels -->
  <div class="form-panels">
    <!-- Propose Project Form (loaded immediately) -->
    <div id="propose-form" class="form-panel active" data-loaded="true">
      <iframe class="nettskjema-iframe"
              src="https://nettskjema.no/a/516751?embed=1"
              title="Propose Your Project"
              frameborder="0"
              width="100%"></iframe>
    </div>

    <!-- Update Project Form (lazy-loaded) -->
    <div id="update-form" class="form-panel" data-loaded="false" data-src="https://nettskjema.no/a/535098?embed=1" data-title="Update an existing living meta-analysis">
      <div class="form-loading-placeholder">
        <p>Loading form...</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Feedback Form (lazy-loaded) -->
    <div id="feedback-form" class="form-panel" data-loaded="false" data-src="https://nettskjema.no/a/516802?embed=1" data-title="Get help or share feedback">
      <div class="form-loading-placeholder">
        <p>Loading form...</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Email fallback -->
  <div class="contact-email-fallback">
    Prefer email? Contact us at <a href="mailto:danielqu@uio.no">danielqu@uio.no</a>
  </div>
</div>

<style>
body {
  background: white !important;
  animation: none !important;
}

body::before,
body::after {
  display: none !important;
}

.contact-forms-container {
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin: 2rem auto;
  padding: 0 1rem;
  background: white !important;
}

.forms-intro {
  text-align: center;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}

.forms-intro h2 {
  color: #0A2A5E;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.form-tabs {
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
}

.form-tab-btn {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  padding: 1rem 1.5rem;
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #6b7280;
  cursor: pointer;
  border-bottom: 3px solid transparent;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  position: relative;
  bottom: -2px;
}

.form-tab-btn:hover {
  color: #0A2A5E;
  background: #f0f6ff;
}

.form-tab-btn.active {
  color: #0A2A5E;
  border-bottom-color: #0A2A5E;
}

.form-panels {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 600px;
}

.form-panel {
  display: none;
}

.form-panel.active {
  display: block;
}

.nettskjema-iframe {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 800px;
  height: 800px;
  border: none;
  display: block;
}

.form-loading-placeholder {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  min-height: 400px;
  color: #9ca3af;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.contact-email-fallback {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 2rem;
  padding-top: 1.5rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
}

.contact-email-fallback a {
  color: #0A2A5E;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.contact-email-fallback a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Responsive tabs */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .form-tabs {
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 0.5rem;
    border-bottom: none;
  }

  .form-tab-btn {
    border-bottom: none;
    border-left: 3px solid transparent;
    text-align: left;
    border-radius: 6px;
  }

  .form-tab-btn.active {
    border-left-color: #0A2A5E;
    border-bottom: none;
    background: #f0f6ff;
  }
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  var tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.form-tab-btn');
  var panels = document.querySelectorAll('.form-panel');

  function showForm(formId) {
    // Hide all panels, deactivate all tabs
    panels.forEach(function(p) { p.classList.remove('active'); });
    tabs.forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove('active'); });

    // Activate selected
    var panel = document.getElementById(formId + '-form');
    panel.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelector('[data-form="' + formId + '"]').classList.add('active');

    // Lazy-load iframe if needed
    if (panel.getAttribute('data-loaded') === 'false') {
      var src = panel.getAttribute('data-src');
      var title = panel.getAttribute('data-title');
      panel.innerHTML = '<iframe class="nettskjema-iframe" src="' + src + '" title="' + title + '" frameborder="0" width="100%"></iframe>';
      panel.setAttribute('data-loaded', 'true');
    }
  }

  // Tab click handlers
  tabs.forEach(function(tab) {
    tab.addEventListener('click', function() {
      showForm(this.getAttribute('data-form'));
    });
  });

  // Handle direct linking to feedback tab
  if (window.location.hash === '#feedback-form') {
    showForm('feedback');
  }
});
</script>
```
